emergency_definition: any electrical issue that causes sparking
loss of power to critical systems

emergency_routing_rules.raw: All emergencies should be transferred to the phone tree for dispatch.
steps: All emergencies should be transferred to the phone tree for dispatch.

non_emergency_routing_rules.raw: Non-emergency calls after hours should be collected and followed up during the next business day.
steps: Non-emergency calls after hours should be collected and followed up during the next business day.

call_transfer_rules.raw: For emergencies, transfer to dispatch phone tree. If transfer does not connect within 60 seconds, return to caller, take a message (name, callback number, service address), and notify dispatch.

integration_constraints: ServiceTrade is used. Do not create sprinkler jobs in ServiceTrade. Automation should only capture details and hand off to humans unless explicitly enabled.
after_hours_flow_summary: After hours, first confirm if this is an emergency. Non-emergency calls after hours should be collected and followed up during the next business day.
office_hours_flow_summary: Non-emergency requests can be scheduled during business hours.
questions_or_unknowns: Missing office address (not found or unclear in transcript).
Missing services supported (not found or unclear in transcript).
